name: Unsplash
description: Search and fetch free high-quality photos from Unsplash (3M+ photos). Returns direct image URLs with required photographer attribution.

credentials_required.label: Unsplash Access Key
credentials_required.hint: Get from https://unsplash.com/oauth/applications — "New Application", accept developer terms, copy the Access Key (not the Secret Key). Demo tier: 50 requests/hour.

tools.name: search_photos
tools.description: Search photos by keyword with optional orientation filter

tools.name: get_random_photo
tools.description: Get a random photo, optionally filtered by query or orientation

tools.name: get_photo
tools.description: Get detailed info for a specific photo by ID

author: freddy-schuetz
